ddls:
CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the district */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the district is located */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the district */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district the school belongs to */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the school */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the school */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the school */,
  "principal_name" TEXT /* Name of the principal */,
  "principal_email" TEXT /* Email of the principal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cohorts" (
  "cohort_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cohort */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the cohort belongs to */,
  "cohort_year" INTEGER /* Year of the cohort */,
  "num_students" INTEGER /* Number of students in the cohort */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the cohort */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the cohort */,
  "average_gpa" REAL /* Average GPA of students in the cohort */,
  "graduation_rate" REAL /* Graduation rate of the cohort */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cohort_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cohorts_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "graduates" (
  "graduate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each graduate record */,
  "cohort_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cohort the graduate belongs to */,
  "num_graduates" INTEGER /* Number of graduates */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Date of graduation */,
  "diploma_id" INTEGER /* ID of the diploma received */,
  "gpa" REAL /* Average GPA of graduates */,
  "college_enrollment_rate" REAL /* Rate of graduates enrolling in college */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("graduate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_graduates_cohort_id FOREIGN KEY ("cohort_id") REFERENCES cohorts ("cohort_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_graduates_diploma_id FOREIGN KEY ("diploma_id") REFERENCES diplomas ("diploma_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "non_graduates" (
  "non_graduate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each non-graduate record */,
  "cohort_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cohort the non-graduate belongs to */,
  "num_non_graduates" INTEGER /* Number of non-graduates */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date of completion */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the completion program */,
  "gpa" REAL /* Average GPA of non-graduates */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* Rate of non-graduates finding employment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("non_graduate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_non_graduates_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES completion_programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_non_graduates_cohort_id FOREIGN KEY ("cohort_id") REFERENCES cohorts ("cohort_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transfers" (
  "transfer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transfer record */,
  "cohort_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cohort the transfer belongs to */,
  "num_transfers" INTEGER /* Number of transfers */,
  "transfer_date" TEXT /* Date of transfer */,
  "transfer_to_school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the students transferred to */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for transfer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transfer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_transfer_to_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("transfer_to_school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_cohort_id FOREIGN KEY ("cohort_id") REFERENCES cohorts ("cohort_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dropouts" (
  "dropout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dropout record */,
  "cohort_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cohort the dropout belongs to */,
  "num_dropouts" INTEGER /* Number of dropouts */,
  "dropout_date" TEXT /* Date of dropout */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for dropping out */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dropout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dropouts_cohort_id FOREIGN KEY ("cohort_id") REFERENCES cohorts ("cohort_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diplomas" (
  "diploma_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diploma */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school offering the diploma */,
  "diploma_name" TEXT /* Name of the diploma */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the diploma */,
  "required_credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits required for the diploma */,
  "gpa_requirement" REAL /* Minimum GPA required for the diploma */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diploma_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diplomas_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "completion_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each completion program */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school offering the program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the completion program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the completion program */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the program */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the program */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Eligibility criteria for the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_completion_programs_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, teacher, counselor) */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district the user belongs to */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the system was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
